item.title: Moral: Don’t be a smartarse in a group of numpties if you can. This makes me sad.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: What just happened?
item.description: Was at the gym with the tinier doing push day, and she's just moved up a weight on bench, so tiny octopus was spotting and encouraging her through her sets. As we were changing weights to go from a bench press to shoulder presses, the lady on the bench in front of us stopped tiny octopus to say that she loved the relationship he has with his daughter. It was nice, only slightly made awkward by the tinier asking him afterwards if she was flirting with him. To which tiny octopus replied, "I DON'T KNOW." Which he really doesn't. He's just chalking it up to some lady being nice and it being a random act of kindness that made tiny octopus smile a bit.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.dc:creator: beergeek

item.title: Validation is important
item.description: Was fobbed off for years as I was successfully in my education, ignored that I had other difficulties. Been considered weird and disorganised my whole life. VALIDATED. Update - quite a lot of people have asked how I was diagnosed, so here goes. Initially I realised when my son was diagnosed, but couldn't do much as I was told I would be at the bottom of the waiting list forever as an adult who was considered successful. Some time later I am in EMDR therapy for ptsd, my therapist picked up on it and drove assessment forwrad, I got the ADHD assessment through my occupational health department at work, and the ASD through my husband private insurance from his work as the NHS was a massive wait list for adult diagnosis
item.dc:creator: NoisyEden

item.title: Please meet my best friend, Bobo.
item.description:
I swear sometimes she looks like a kangaroo!!!
HERE SHE IS DRIVING ME TO THE VET!
Previous owners set her on fire. The hair is not going to grow back, but she's completely healed now and living her best life!

item.title: Images of Note: OMEN
item.description:
Games Workshop: "Fascism will make everything suck." Fascists: "Boy, I sure do wanna give in the WH40K universe!"
"THIS IS HOW EVERYONE HAS LIVED AND SHOULD LIVE ALWAYS" > Looks at the past > Community.
mood
Bold of you to assume you can catch a positive vibe in the Suburbs.
when you talk to me this is who you're talking to.
*to the tune of "Knees up Mother Brown"* German Dungeon porn German Dungeon porn German Dungeon, German Dungeon German Dungeon porn
mood
They have chosen...death
Straight to Cumbernauld
WH40K lore is fucking fire tho.
:q
Hold the fuck up I recognise that road https://www.google.com/maps/@56.1967814,-3.4252983,3a,71.7y,315.91h,84.42t/data=!3m6!1e1!3m4!1sPM1z3b52_b6aluSJ4kOl-g!2e0!7i16384!8i8192?entry=ttu
The Brave and the Bold was a weird show.
I have seen this multiple times and every time I take 10 psychic damage.
RIP MatPat ;_;
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Woohoo I'm an audiobook narrator now!
item.description: Okay well the book itself is really fun!! Genuinely I would read this book even if I wasn't being paid to narrate. But uh, some chapters get... Steamy. My mother would clutch her pearls to hear some of this haha Also this isn't my career so I'm gonna have to use a pseudonym so if my name gets googled they see my beautiful park designs and not me narrating a demon getting fisted by a pastry chef lol
item.dc:creator: thatprickleypear

item.title: The 382nd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - DOGS!!! Edition #16
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Moon Moon!
THEY'RE WORKING!
They could just ask me for treats
ADAP (All Doggo Are Pupper)
YES
I'm good at depression!
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Puppers #Doggos #PuppersAndDoggos #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple

item.title: You're outnumbered.
item.description:
"To put it simply, it's charisma. As the investigation continues, his ideology and opinions will be all over the media: online news, TV, magazines... The current age, for better or worse, is one of suppression. People influenced by his ideas will definitely appear. That's where the League of Villains comes in. The Hosu incident suggests that Stain and the League are connected somehow. With this, the League will go from being thought of as a bunch of juvenile delinquents that attacked U.A. to being recognized as the group with that ideology. In other words, there's a receptacle ready to receive them. Even if the malice of each individual is small, if all that evil gathers under one will, it will swell up to hundreds of times that. If the enemy general knew this would happen from the beginning, then he's pretty good. He's steadily getting rid of obstacles, trying to create conditions to further his own purpose." - Gran Torino (My Hero Academia) When they think they're alone, fascists aren't as much of a problem. They are rightfully too afraid to expose themselves and their ideals, they keep it in the family. But when there's enough for a group, or a rally, they find they have strength in numbers, that they aren't alone, that they can stand up and take what they want. We have to be there to stand in their way, to show them their numbers are meaningless. There is no winning scenario for them, not here, not in the whole of the free world. The Nazis were beaten. The South was beaten. Trump was beaten. If you continue to practice your hate, you'll be beaten too.
"You know, the last time I was in Germany and saw a man standing above everybody else, we ended up disagreeing." "Don't worry. I've punched Hitler over 200 times."
To all the Punishers out there, you DON'T understand what he is. You're just as much a punisher as you are a spartan, as you are a rambo, or any other idolized machoman fighter. What you are is a chihuahua, you act fierce and bark loud because the world around you scares you. If someone tried to offer their hand, you'd lash out and bite, even if they were trying to help lift you out of this fascist pitfall you've found yourself in.
Corrupt cops get Punished.
Even the Joker doesn't side with nazis.
Speak out against racist jokes. Don't let someone think they're funny.
item.dc:creator: Onlyhereforthelaughs

item.title: Guy love
item.description: Edit: I like all the conversion this is sparking. Tarot hate and support, meditation tangents. Different patterned goths I never knew about. Cropping burns. Comments best part of Imgur IMO. I’m stuck inside while it is howling / nuking snow outside. Listening to The Feelies records. Good distraction. I always read every comment folks make on my posts. Even the ones that pop up two months after the post has sunsetted

item.title: I could feel that .. still do.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Duolingo lays off employees to replace with AI
item.description:
It's definitely shitty to lay off employees, replace them with AI and have the ones you keep be responsible for correcting AI mistakes. I started looking into this to see how many people were laid off and all I could find was click bait articles about "10% of contracted employees laid off" with no actual numbers.
Looking at Duolingo's website it has a break down of the make up of their 700+ employee company which 9% are listed as learning. Which is about 70 people if all are only contracted employees.
So in this situation about 7-10 people lost their jobs or didn't have their contracts renewed because of AI.
I fucking hate that some people lost their jobs to AI here, I also hate that click bait media makes it seem like they laid off thousands of workers. Duolingo has been using AI for a few years now with Times sitting their use of AI as the contributing reason for making the Times 100 list of most influential companies of 2023. I think AI can be a great and useful tool but it shouldn't be used there needs to be some systems in place soon to prevent people from losing jobs at such a maddening rate. I wish universal basic income had more support.
item.dc:creator: Sensiblyinteresting
